title: Evangelion 30 Australian Premiere at AVCon July 12th
display_title: Evangelion 30 Australian Premiere at AVCon July 12th
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Australian Premiere at AVCon (July 12th)             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Jun 28, 2013 8:48 pm Madman Official Facebook wrote: Evangelion fans, we will be having the official Australian premiere of Evangelion 3.0: You Can (Not) Redo. at AVCon: Adelaide's Anime & Video Games Convention on July 12th! Make sure you are there to be the first to see it on the big screen! The theatre will hold over 1000 people! We will also have a limited selection of Evangelion 3.0 goods for sale at our booth.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 Australian Premiere at AVCon (July 12th)             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sat Jun 29, 2013 1:32 am EvangelionFan wrote: Evangelion 3.0 Screening on Friday, July 12th at 8.00pm (http://avcon.org.au/information/timetable). Adelaide's Anime & Video Games convention is at the Adelaide Convention Centre...
